title: Carry out warehousing procedures in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out warehousing procedures in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Receive incoming goods

pcs.text: General receiving bay housekeeping is undertaken according to workplace procedures1.2 Received goods are checked and validated against delivery information according to workplace procedures1.3 Received goods are unpacked and inspected according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements1.4 Discrepancies in quality of unpacked goods or breakages are documented according to workplace procedures1.5 Stock levels are accurately documented on stock systems according to workplace procedures1.6 Packing materials are disposed of according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can General receiving bay housekeeping is undertaken according to workplace procedures1.2 Received goods are checked and validated against delivery information according to workplace procedures1.3 Received goods are unpacked and inspected according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements1.4 Discrepancies in quality of unpacked goods or breakages are documented according to workplace procedures1.5 Stock levels are accurately documented on stock systems according to workplace procedures1.6 Packing materials are disposed of according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can General receiving bay housekeeping is undertaken according to workplace procedures1.2 Received goods are checked and validated against delivery information according to workplace procedures1.3 Received goods are unpacked and inspected according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements1.4 Discrepancies in quality of unpacked goods or breakages are documented according to workplace procedures1.5 Stock levels are accurately documented on stock systems according to workplace procedures1.6 Packing materials are disposed of according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Receive incoming goods

elements.title: Store goods

pcs.text: Received goods are transported to appropriate storage area without causing damage to product or packaging according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Goods and parts containers are labelled according to workplace procedures2.3 Parts are transferred to labelled containers in storage area following established stock rotation procedures2.4 Goods are stored according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and, where applicable, at correct temperatures to maintain product quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Received goods are transported to appropriate storage area without causing damage to product or packaging according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Goods and parts containers are labelled according to workplace procedures2.3 Parts are transferred to labelled containers in storage area following established stock rotation procedures2.4 Goods are stored according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and, where applicable, at correct temperatures to maintain product quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Received goods are transported to appropriate storage area without causing damage to product or packaging according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Goods and parts containers are labelled according to workplace procedures2.3 Parts are transferred to labelled containers in storage area following established stock rotation procedures2.4 Goods are stored according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and, where applicable, at correct temperatures to maintain product quality.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Store goods

elements.title: Dispatch goods

pcs.text: Dispatch information is identified and confirmed3.2 Goods for dispatch are selected and any identified non-conforming goods are labelled with supplier details and date and reason for return, or referred to supervisor3.3 Goods for dispatch are packed securely, labelled and stored awaiting dispatch according to workplace procedures and safety requirements 3.4 Goods are dispatched to customer or end user according to workplace procedures3.5 Warehousing documentation is completed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispatch information is identified and confirmed3.2 Goods for dispatch are selected and any identified non-conforming goods are labelled with supplier details and date and reason for return, or referred to supervisor3.3 Goods for dispatch are packed securely, labelled and stored awaiting dispatch according to workplace procedures and safety requirements 3.4 Goods are dispatched to customer or end user according to workplace procedures3.5 Warehousing documentation is completed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispatch information is identified and confirmed3.2 Goods for dispatch are selected and any identified non-conforming goods are labelled with supplier details and date and reason for return, or referred to supervisor3.3 Goods for dispatch are packed securely, labelled and stored awaiting dispatch according to workplace procedures and safety requirements 3.4 Goods are dispatched to customer or end user according to workplace procedures3.5 Warehousing documentation is completed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Dispatch goods

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
